testsuite.name: tests.PositiveLambdaTest

testcase.name: Заполнение всех полей формы студента, и проверка на соответствие

failure.message: Invalid element state [#submit]: element click intercepted: Element is not clickable at point (1285, 517). Other element would receive the click: ... Other element would receive the click: ...
